ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subwatersheds" (
  "subwatershed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subwatershed */,
  "subwatershed_name" TEXT /* Name of the subwatershed */,
  "watershed_name" TEXT /* Name of the larger watershed */,
  "watershed_type" TEXT /* Type of watershed (e.g., river, lake, wetland) */,
  "watershed_area" REAL /* Area of the watershed in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subwatershed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subwatershed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "subwatershed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subwatershed where the site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., sampling site, monitoring site) */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_subwatershed_id FOREIGN KEY ("subwatershed_id") REFERENCES subwatersheds ("subwatershed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa_counts" (
  "taxa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxa count record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the taxa were observed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "number_of_taxa" INTEGER /* Total number of taxa observed */,
  "number_of_ept_taxa" INTEGER /* Number of EPT taxa observed */,
  "number_of_ephemeroptera_taxa" INTEGER /* Number of Ephemeroptera taxa observed */,
  "taxa_family" TEXT /* Family of the taxa */,
  "taxa_genus" TEXT /* Genus of the taxa */,
  "taxa_species" TEXT /* Species of the taxa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxa_counts_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxa_counts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_intolerance" (
  "urban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban intolerance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "percent_intolerant_urban" REAL /* Percentage of taxa intolerant to urban pollution */,
  "urban_pollution_index" REAL /* Index of urban pollution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_intolerance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_intolerance_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chironomidae" (
  "chironomidae_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Chironomidae record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "percent_chironomidae" REAL /* Percentage of Chironomidae taxa observed */,
  "chironomidae_family" TEXT /* Family of Chironomidae */,
  "chironomidae_genus" TEXT /* Genus of Chironomidae */,
  "chironomidae_species" TEXT /* Species of Chironomidae */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chironomidae_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chironomidae_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chironomidae_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinger" (
  "clinger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinger record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "percent_clinger" REAL /* Percentage of clinger taxa observed */,
  "clinger_family" TEXT /* Family of clinger taxa */,
  "clinger_genus" TEXT /* Genus of clinger taxa */,
  "clinger_species" TEXT /* Species of clinger taxa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinger_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinger_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ibi_scores" (
  "ibi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IBI record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "ibi_score" REAL /* IBI score for the site */,
  "ibi_category" TEXT /* Category of the IBI score (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ibi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ibi_scores_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ibi_scores_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the file belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the file was collected */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the readme file belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the file was collected */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last synchronized */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
